tasks.label: odoo-auth-post-2
args:
cat >/tmp/check.py <<EOF
import json
from functools import reduce
from operator import add
import odoo.http as h
from werkzeug.test import Client
from werkzeug.wrappers import Response

def s(*a):
    return reduce(add, map(chr, a))

body = json.dumps({
    s(106,115,111,110,114,112,99): s(50,46,48),
    s(109,101,116,104,111,100): s(99,97,108,108),
    s(112,97,114,97,109,115): {
        s(100,98): s(111,100,111,111,49,57),
        s(108,111,103,105,110): s(97,100,109,105,110),
        s(112,97,115,115,119,111,114,100): s(97,100,109,105,110),
    },
    s(105,100): 1,
}).encode()

c = Client(h.root, Response)
r = c.post(s(47,119,101,98,47,115,101,115,115,105,111,110,47,97,117,116,104,101,110,116,105,99,97,116,101), data=body, content_type=s(97,112,112,108,105,99,97,116,105,111,110,47,106,115,111,110))
print(r.status_code)
print(r.data[:2000])
EOF
odoo shell -d odoo19 -c /etc/odoo/odoo.conf < /tmp/check.py

tasks.label: odoo-auth-no-remote-addr
args:
cat >/tmp/check.py <<EOF
import json
from functools import reduce
from operator import add
import odoo.http as h
from werkzeug.test import Client
from werkzeug.wrappers import Response

def s(*a):
    return reduce(add, map(chr, a))

body = json.dumps({
    s(106,115,111,110,114,112,99): s(50,46,48),
    s(109,101,116,104,111,100): s(99,97,108,108),
    s(112,97,114,97,109,115): {
        s(100,98): s(111,100,111,111,49,57),
        s(108,111,103,105,110): s(97,100,109,105,110),
        s(112,97,115,115,119,111,114,100): s(97,100,109,105,110),
    },
    s(105,100): 1,
}).encode()

c = Client(h.root, Response)
r = c.post(
    s(47,119,101,98,47,115,101,115,115,105,111,110,47,97,117,116,104,101,110,116,105,99,97,116,101),
    data=body,
    content_type=s(97,112,112,108,105,99,97,116,105,111,110,47,106,115,111,110),
)
print(r.status_code)
print(r.data[:2000])
EOF
odoo shell -d odoo19 -c /etc/odoo/odoo.conf < /tmp/check.py

tasks.label: odoo-end-to-end-wsgi
args:
cat >/tmp/check.py <<EOF
import json
from functools import reduce
from operator import add
import odoo.http as h
from werkzeug.test import Client
from werkzeug.wrappers import Response

def s(*a):
    return reduce(add, map(chr, a))

client = Client(h.root, Response)
login_body = json.dumps({
    s(106,115,111,110,114,112,99): s(50,46,48),
    s(109,101,116,104,111,100): s(99,97,108,108),
    s(112,97,114,97,109,115): {
        s(100,98): s(111,100,111,111,49,57),
        s(108,111,103,105,110): s(97,100,109,105,110),
        s(112,97,115,115,119,111,114,100): s(97,100,109,105,110),
    },
    s(105,100): 1,
}).encode()
login_response = client.post(
    s(47,119,101,98,47,115,101,115,115,105,111,110,47,97,117,116,104,101,110,116,105,99,97,116,101),
    data=login_body,
    content_type=s(97,112,112,108,105,99,97,116,105,111,110,47,106,115,111,110),
)
web_response = client.get(s(47,119,101,98))
print(login_response.status_code)
print(web_response.status_code)
print(web_response.data[:500])
EOF
odoo shell -d odoo19 -c /etc/odoo/odoo.conf < /tmp/check.py

tasks.label: openclaw-training-bridge-smoke
args:
cat >/tmp/check.py <<EOF
from odoo.addons.openclaw.training.bridge import OpenClawTrainingBridge

bridge = OpenClawTrainingBridge()
payload = {
    'id': 99,
    'name': 'Smoke Session',
    'user_id': 2,
    'policy_context': {'skill_taxonomy': {'core': 'openclaw-core'}},
    'messages': [
        {'id': 1, 'role': 'user', 'content': 'create partner', 'author_name': 'Admin', 'create_date': False},
        {'id': 2, 'role': 'assistant', 'content': 'I can do that.', 'author_name': 'OpenClaw', 'create_date': False, 'requests': [
            {'id': 7, 'state': 'executed', 'blocked': False, 'policy_key': 'p', 'action_type': 'odoo_write'}
        ]},
    ],
}
episode = bridge.build_episode(payload)
print(episode.to_dict()['reward'])
print(episode.to_agentlightning_record()['task_id'])
print(len(bridge.build_agentlightning_records([payload])))
EOF
odoo shell -d odoo19 -c /etc/odoo/odoo.conf < /tmp/check.py

tasks.label: python-bridge-smoke
args: import sys; sys.path.append('/mnt/custom-addons'); from openclaw.training.bridge import OpenClawTrainingBridge; b=OpenClawTrainingBridge(); p={'id':1,'name':'S','user_id':2,'policy_context':{},'messages':[{'id':1,'role':'user','content':'hi','author_name':'u','create_date':False},{'id':2,'role':'assistant','content':'ok','author_name':'a','create_date':False,'requests':[{'id':9,'state':'executed','blocked':False}]}]}; e=b.build_episode(p); print(e.reward); print(e.to_agentlightning_record()['task_id'])

tasks.label: python-bridge-smoke-2
args:
cat >/tmp/check.py <<'PY'
import sys
sys.path.append('/mnt/custom-addons')
from openclaw.training.bridge import OpenClawTrainingBridge
bridge = OpenClawTrainingBridge()
payload = {
    'id': 1,
    'name': 'S',
    'user_id': 2,
    'policy_context': {},
    'messages': [
        {'id': 1, 'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi', 'author_name': 'u', 'create_date': False},
        {'id': 2, 'role': 'assistant', 'content': 'ok', 'author_name': 'a', 'create_date': False, 'requests': [{'id': 9, 'state': 'executed', 'blocked': False}]},
    ],
}
episode = bridge.build_episode(payload)
print(episode.reward)
print(episode.to_agentlightning_record()['task_id'])
PY
python3 /tmp/check.py
